name: oil_gas_daily_production
description: Daily oil production data per well using ARPS decline curve formula with shut-in simulation

typical_rows.note: per well; days of production randomly selected between 100 and 700

arps_formula.expression: (q_i * q_i_multiplier) / power(1 + b * d * variation * day_from_first_production, 1/b)
arps_formula.description: ARPS hyperbolic decline with shut-in multiplier and production variation

columns.name: well_num
columns.description: Well API number (foreign key to well headers)

generation.note: Set from well header API_NUMBER in per-well loop

columns.name: first_production_date
columns.description: Date of first production for this well

columns.name: q_i
columns.description: ARPS initial production rate (BOPD) from well header

columns.name: d
columns.description: ARPS initial decline rate from well header

columns.name: actuals_bopd
columns.description: Actual oil production in barrels per day

generation.expr: (q_i * q_i_multiplier) / power(1 + b * d * variation * day_from_first_production, 1/b)
